subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord, the Desired One, Who alone is worthy and befitting, Who through the movement of the Most Exalted Pen hath brought forth the people of the earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از حرکه قلم اعلی اهل ناسوت انشاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
